title: ipomoea batatas var. xanthorhiza
intro: Ipomoea batatas var. xanthorhiza, commonly known as yellow yam or Chinese yam, is a variety of the sweet potato plant that is native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to promote digestion, reduce inflammation, and lower blood sugar levels. The health benefits of Ipomoea batatas var. xanthorhiza include its potential to aid in weight management, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tonics, often in combination with other medicinal herbs, to harness its various health benefits.
